name: Meat Pasties
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the dough ingredients together and divide them into approximately 20 portions.
2. Roll out each portion of dough, place filling mixture in the center, add a small dot of butter on top, fold the edges over, and seal by pressing down the rolled edge.
3. Bake at 190°C (374°F) for one hour. They can be served hot plain or with gravy, or cold as a sandwich. They also freeze well.
This family recipe takes some time but results in delicious pasties. For best results, chop the vegetables raw and cook them inside the pastie. The meats can be chopped or ground on a coarse setting; grinding too fine may affect texture. Combine all filling ingredients before assembling the pasties, using a large bowl to ensure proper mixing.
